name: akyla-financial-data
description: Cited SEC fundamentals, quotes, statements, comps & a US-equity screener — straight from primary filings.
long_description: Pull as-reported US-equity fundamentals sourced directly from SEC inline-XBRL filings, live quotes, full financial statements, valuation comps, and screen ~5-8k US stocks. Statement values carry per-cell SEC filing provenance (accession number + XBRL fact id) so answers can be cited to the primary source. Powered by the Akyla Financial Data API.
